role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified German text ('Ausfahrt freihalten', 'Auffahrt') and limited analysis to script/language.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (temperate deciduous, rolling hills).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific species (Betula pendula) and vegetation types consistent with the image.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (cobblestone gutters, paving) and street furniture (bins).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain features (architecture, bins, gutters) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Germany as the location. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and the tournament logic correctly prioritized the strongest candidate (Germany) over the closest competitor (Austria).

visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Cobblestone gutters and bins clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: House style and street furniture match description.
